summary: Completed testing of P2 features: (1) GET /api/dashboard with optional trust_id query param, (2) GET /api/beneficiaries/dashboard endpoint, (3) Frontend /trust/beneficiaries page with pie chart and holder list. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with all components working correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - React hydration issue with table rendering, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/dashboard without trust_id returns most recent trust's dashboard
GET /api/dashboard with valid trust_id returns specific trust's dashboard
GET /api/dashboard with invalid trust_id returns 404
GET /api/dashboard with other user's trust_id returns 404 (access denied)
GET /api/beneficiaries/dashboard returns BeneficiaryDashboardResponse structure
GET /api/beneficiaries/dashboard with trust_id works correctly
GET /api/beneficiaries/dashboard with invalid trust_id returns 404
BeneficiaryAllocation structure validated (holder_name, total_units, percentage, certificate_count, certificates)
RecentTransfers structure validated (transfer_id, to_holder, from_holder, units, reason, created_at)
Beneficiaries sorted by total_units descending
Remaining units calculation verified (total_authorized - total_issued)
Authentication required for both endpoints (401 without auth)
Frontend: Beneficiaries nav item visible in sidebar under Structures
Frontend: Page loads at /trust/beneficiaries with title 'Beneficiary Allocations'
Frontend: Summary cards show Total Authorized (100), Issued (99), Remaining (1), Beneficiaries (13)
Frontend: Ownership pie chart displays with color-coded holders and legend
Frontend: 13 beneficiary rows displayed with units and percentage
Frontend: Clicking holder row expands to show certificate details (CU-004, 24 units)
Frontend: Recent Transfers section shows transfer history (5 visible transfers)
Frontend: Manage Units button navigates to /trust/units

frontend_beneficiaries_page.certificate_details: Shows certificate number, units, issue date in expanded view
frontend_beneficiaries_page.recent_transfers: Shows transfer history below holder list

critical_code_review_comments: Minor React hydration warning in TrustUnitsPage - <tr> rendered inside <span> wrapper. Consider using React.Fragment or removing span wrapper for table rows. Does not affect functionality.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo data with 13 beneficiaries and 99 issued units
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 features fully implemented and tested. Dashboard endpoint accepts optional trust_id param with proper validation. Beneficiary Dashboard shows ownership distribution via pie chart, 13 certificate holders with expandable certificate details, and recent transfer history. All navigation works correctly. Known minor issue: React hydration warning in TrustUnitsPage table rendering (cosmetic only).
